titles.title: Just as I Am, without One Plea

authors.author: Charlotte Elliott
William Batchelder Bradbury
So wie ich bin, so muss es sein

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Just as I am, without one plea, But that Thy blood was shed for me, And that Thou bidst me come to Thee, O Lamb of God, I come! I come!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just as I am, and waiting not To rid my soul of one dark blot; To Thee whose blood can cleanse each spot, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Just as I am, though tossed about With many a conflict, many a doubt; Fightings and fears within without, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!

verse.name: v4
v5
verse.lines: Just as I am, Thou wilt receive, Wilt welcome, pardon, cleanse, relieve; Because Thy promise I believe, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Just as I am, Thy love unknown Has broken every barrier down; Now, to be Thine, yea, Thine alone, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
